race.comment: TEMPTED (1) returned from her breathtaking second in The Everest, with an effortless victory over 1200m in the G3 Eskimo Prince Stakes at this track in sizzling time. Back against her own sex and Schofield has options from the gate. Will have little trouble running the trip and justifying the short price. APOCALYPTIC (2) ready for this trip and further now after she failed to sprint with SAVVY HALLIE first up as fav when closed late to run second over 1200m in the G2 Light Fingers Stakes at this track. Expect to see a more positive ride early and shapes as the main danger. SAVVY HALLIE (4) third-up for this after she pinched a break in the straight for a decisive victory over 1200m in the G2 Light Fingers Stakes at this track. Tougher today and can take a hand in the finish. OLE DANCER (3) Caulfield Guineas winner who gave away too much start on resumption before surging late to run second over 1400m in the LR Desirable Stakes at Flemington. Looking for the mile now. Place best.
